description: A query accessing one of the resource properties through [alias](https://docs.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/azure-policy/policy-definition#aliases).

query.query: where type =~ 'Microsoft.Web/serverFarms' | extend skuName = tostring(aliases['Microsoft.Web/serverfarms/sku.name']) | summarize count() by skuName

title: Access a properties field through alias
